title: China's Xi Jinping Congratulates Charles On Becoming Britain's King
description: Chinese President Xi Jinping has sent a congratulatory message to King Charles on his accession to the British throne.
keywords: Chinese President Xi Jinping, King Charles III, UK News, king charles Accession, King Charles, UK, Queen Elizabeth 2 death, Xi Jinping
snippet:
King Charles: Charles III was proclaimed Britain's new king by the Accession Council on Saturday.
